{{CargoRelic
|name=Jinx Source Energy Crystal
|class_id=22904
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Jinx Source Energy Crystal is a unique resource formed under specific geological conditions, making it extremely rare in the Earth's crust. This crystal can collect and convert natural energy, becoming an efficient artificial energy battery that supports the application of various advanced technologies. It has played a significant role in enhancing productivity and has shown revolutionary potential in energy technology, allowing ordinary people with poor magical talent to possess mage-level destructive power, sparking a dramatic social revolution.
|fame=63
|art=55
|fth=70
|civ=66
|tech=108
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Mecha Minion HP +3%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +3<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Mecha Minion HP +4%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +4<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Mecha Minion HP +5%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +5<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Mecha Minion HP +7%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +7<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Mecha Minion HP +9%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +9<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Mecha Minion HP +12%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +12<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Mecha Minion HP +12%<br>Per Bionic Part extracted, Snail ATK +12<br>Bionic Part Extracted: 50/50<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Card Drops +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x B-tad Drops +6%
}}
